# age recipients for vault-pass.age — one PUBLIC key per line. Lines
# starting with # are ignored. Supported key types:
#   ssh-ed25519 / ssh-rsa   (e.g. a line copied from https://github.com/<user>.keys)
#   age1...                 (from `age-keygen`)
# NOT supported by age: ecdsa-sha2-* and FIDO sk-ssh-* keys.
#
# These are public keys — safe to commit. Everyone listed here can decrypt the
# production vault password. Keep the list PINNED and reviewed (a hijacked GitHub
# account could swap keys, so don't blind-refetch). Whenever you change this list,
# re-encrypt vault-pass.age (see ../README.md "Vault password").
#
# Add real recipients below this line:
#
# lionel-panhaleux
ssh-rsa  lpanhaleux@atropos
